body:0002.source: A participation method is a way for people to interact with a project on the platform. Each method represents a different type of engagement, from submitting ideas or completing surveys to voting, volunteering, or reviewing documents.
body:0002.target: A participation method is a way for people to interact with a project on the platform. Each method represents a different type of engagement, from submitting ideas or completing surveys to voting, volunteering, or reviewing documents.

body:0003.source: Participation methods help structure how input is collected, shared, or acted on. By choosing the right method for a phase, project owners can guide how the community engages and ensure the interaction fits the project’s goals.
body:0003.target: Participation methods help structure how input is collected, shared, or acted on. By choosing the right method for a phase, project owners can guide how the community engages and ensure the interaction fits the project’s goals.

body:0004.source: What are the different participation methods on the platform?
body:0004.target: What are the different participation methods on the platform?

body:0007.source: Use this method when you want broad, open community engagement and discussion. It’s ideal for gathering ideas, comments, and feedback in a transparent way.
body:0007.target: Use this method when you want broad, open community engagement and discussion. It’s ideal for gathering ideas, comments, and feedback in a transparent way.

body:0009.source: Public idea submissions and threaded discussions.
body:0009.target: Public idea submissions and threaded discussions.

body:0010.source: Map view to collect geospatial input (e.g. residents pin contributions on a map).
body:0010.target: Map view to collect geospatial input (e.g. residents pin contributions on a map).

body:0011.source: ESRI add‑on integration for advanced map setups.
body:0011.target: ESRI add‑on integration for advanced map setups.

body:0012.source: Read more about this participation method in our support article on ‘Ideation, proposals and input management’.
body:0012.target: Read more about this participation method in our support article on ‘Ideation, proposals and input management’.

body:0015.source: Use when you want participants to rank, vote, or prioritize options — especially for decision‑making or budget allocation.
body:0015.target: Use when you want participants to rank, vote, or prioritize options — especially for decision‑making or budget allocation.

body:0017.source: Multiple voting methods available (ranking, up/down voting, etc.)
body:0017.target: Multiple voting methods available (ranking, up/down voting, etc.)

body:0018.source: Supports participatory budgeting exercises (participants allocate funds to preferred options)
body:0018.target: Supports participatory budgeting exercises (participants allocate funds to preferred options)

body:0019.source: Quantifies community preferences to guide priorities
body:0019.target: Quantifies community preferences to guide priorities

body:0020.source: Read more about this participation method in our support article on ‘Voting and Prioritization’.
body:0020.target: Read more about this participation method in our support article on ‘Voting and Prioritization’.

body:0023.source: Use surveys for structured, in‑depth feedback or quick insights via short polls.
body:0023.target: Use surveys for structured, in‑depth feedback or quick insights via short polls.

body:0025.source: In‑platform surveys with multiple question types (e.g., multiple choice, open text).
body:0025.target: In‑platform surveys with multiple question types (e.g., multiple choice, open text).

body:0026.source: Embed external surveys for advanced data collection.
body:0026.target: Embed external surveys for advanced data collection.

body:0027.source: Quick polls that display directly on a project page.
body:0027.target: Quick polls that display directly on a project page.

body:0028.source: Read more about this participation method in our support article on ‘Surveys’.
body:0028.target: Read more about this participation method in our support article on ‘Surveys’.

body:0031.source: Use this method when you want the community to submit their own ideas or campaigns for others to support.
body:0031.target: Use this method when you want the community to submit their own ideas or campaigns for others to support.

body:0033.source: Users upload proposals or petitions for community backing.
body:0033.target: Users upload proposals or petitions for community backing.

body:0034.source: Time and vote limits can be set to control the process.
body:0034.target: Time and vote limits can be set to control the process.

body:0035.source: Ideal for crowdsourcing initiatives and building consensus.
body:0035.target: Ideal for crowdsourcing initiatives and building consensus.

body:0036.source: Read more about this participation method in our support article on ‘Ideation, proposals and input management’.
body:0036.target: Read more about this participation method in our support article on ‘Ideation, proposals and input management’.

body:0039.source: When a large consultation generates thousands of contributions and finding consensus feels overwhelming — it bridges open ideation and deeper deliberation.
body:0039.target: When a large consultation generates thousands of contributions and finding consensus feels overwhelming — it bridges open ideation and deeper deliberation.

body:0041.source: Participants react to concise trade-off statements (agree / unsure / disagree), producing a clear map of where opinions align or diverge.
body:0041.target: Participants react to concise trade-off statements (agree / unsure / disagree), producing a clear map of where opinions align or diverge.

body:0042.source: Results are visualized in real time for participants and admins, increasing transparency and showing how each voice contributes to the community view.
body:0042.target: Results are visualized in real time for participants and admins, increasing transparency and showing how each voice contributes to the community view.

body:0043.source:
Read more about finding common ground method here
​
body:0043.target:
Read more about finding common ground method here
​

body:0046.source: Use when you need to keep your community informed or share results from other participation phases.
body:0046.target: Use when you need to keep your community informed or share results from other participation phases.

body:0049.source: Create attractive reports to summarize findings.
body:0049.target: Create attractive reports to summarize findings.

body:0050.source: Reports appear on the phase description for easy visibility.
body:0050.target: Reports appear on the phase description for easy visibility.

body:0051.source: Read more about this participation method in our support article on ‘Report Builder’.
body:0051.target: Read more about this participation method in our support article on ‘Report Builder’.

body:0054.source: Use this method when you want to mobilize people for events, panels, or community efforts.
body:0054.target: Use this method when you want to mobilize people for events, panels, or community efforts.

body:0056.source: Recruit volunteers or participants for specific causes or activities.
body:0056.target: Recruit volunteers or participants for specific causes or activities.

body:0057.source: Manage sign‑ups easily from the platform.
body:0057.target: Manage sign‑ups easily from the platform.

body:0058.source: Builds an active, engaged community base.
body:0058.target: Builds an active, engaged community base.

body:0059.source: Read more about this participation method in our support article on ‘Volunteering’.
body:0059.target: Read more about this participation method in our support article on ‘Volunteering’.

body:0062.source: Use when you need collaborative review of documents like plans, proposals, or policy drafts.
body:0062.target: Use when you need collaborative review of documents like plans, proposals, or policy drafts.

body:0064.source: Konveio integration to embed and annotate PDFs
body:0064.target: Konveio integration to embed and annotate PDFs

body:0065.source: Users provide comments directly on the document
body:0065.target: Users provide comments directly on the document

body:0066.source: Ideal for detailed feedback and refinement
body:0066.target: Ideal for detailed feedback and refinement

body:0067.source: Read more about this participation method in our support article on ‘Konveio’.
body:0067.target: Read more about this participation method in our support article on ‘Konveio’.
